pages.text: Before one can begin the Great Work, the proper vessels must be forged. The Aspect Cauldron is no ordinary pot, and the glass required for essence storage must be reinforced with precious metals.

pages.title: Forging the Cauldron
pages.text: The foundation of your laboratory. A heavy vessel forged from copper and gold, designed to withstand the immense heat and spiritual pressure of aspect transmutation.
Ordinary glass is too fragile for raw essences. By reinforcing a bottle with copper, you create a vessel capable of holding basic alchemical drafts.
Gilding the glass with gold provides a higher resonance, allowing the bottle to contain more complex mixtures without shattering from the internal energy.

pages.title: Large Alchemical Bottle
pages.text: The pinnacle of storage. Amethyst and Diamond shards stabilize the largest volumes of liquid magic, creating a near-perfect containment field for the most volatile elixirs.
